# Wave 8 — DPA & Consent Readiness
<!-- Auto-generated by Wave 8 Gate Commander — 2026-05-07 -->

> **Lawyer Review Required:** These documents are templates. Have them reviewed by a Saudi-licensed lawyer before use with any paying customer.
> **Status:** draft_only — requires lawyer sign-off before live use.

## Documents in This Pack

| Document | Location | Purpose | Status |

| DPA Checklist (AR+EN) | `docs/wave8/DPA_CHECKLIST_AR_EN.md` | Pre-signing DPA checklist | draft_only — needs lawyer review |

## Mandatory Steps Before First Customer

1. ☐ Lawyer reviews and approves DPA template
2. ☐ Customer signs DPA before any data processing
3. ☐ WhatsApp consent checklist completed (if WhatsApp used)
4. ☐ Proof publication consent signed before publishing case study
5. ☐ DSR process in place (customer can request deletion)
6. ☐ Data retention policy communicated to customer

## PDPL Compliance Summary (Saudi Arabia)

| Requirement | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Data Processing Agreement | draft_ready | Needs lawyer sign-off |
| Data minimization | ENFORCED | Wizard only collects necessary fields |
| Purpose limitation | ENFORCED | Data used only for agreed service delivery |
| Consent for marketing | BLOCKED | No marketing without explicit opt-in |
| Right to deletion (DSR) | draft_ready | DSR template available |
| Cross-border transfer | draft_ready | See docs/CROSS_BORDER_TRANSFER_ADDENDUM.md |
| Data breach notification | draft_ready | See docs/BREACH_NOTIFICATION_POLICY.md |

## Arabic Note / ملاحظة عربية

وفقًا لنظام حماية البيانات الشخصية (PDPL) السعودي، يجب الحصول على موافقة صريحة قبل معالجة أي بيانات شخصية. جميع اتفاقيّات معالجة البيانات (DPA) يجب أن تُراجَع من محامٍ مرخّص في المملكة العربية السعودية قبل التوقيع.
